name: oolio-pm
description: Oolio Product Management. The full PM toolkit, signal to shipped: intake raw feedback into JPD (feedback-to-idea), groom ideas to standard (jpd-idea-groomer, jpd-title-standard, jpd-loop), write and pressure-test PRDs (write-prd, grill-my-prd, grill-me), validate decisions against the Virtual Product Council and its persona library (convene-vpc + operator/design/leadership subcommittees, storm-research), keep Jira tidy (jira-epic-groomer, jira-epic-titler), prepare Steering (steering-pack), ship the GTM pack (gtm-handover, gtm-playbooks, gtm-marketing), and measure the result (metrics-review).
